rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §103.151, which governs comptroller payment of wrongful-imprisonment compensation. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The comptroller shall make the compensation due a claimant under Section 103.052
_note: No conflict; the two provisions address entirely different subject matters.
